title: XP Health
description: XP Health is a simple Fabric mod that rewards players with additional health as they gain experience levels.
body:
XP Health is a simple Fabric mod that rewards players with additional health as they gain experience levels.

![image describes how xp increases player's health](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/15e5b1976ecd4c1ff420d5cd2edbf89638d9ab6b.png)

## Features

- **Level Up, Health Up**: For every **5 experience levels** (configurable), you gain **1 extra heart** (2 HP).
  - Level 5: +1 Heart
  - Level 10: +2 Hearts
  - ...
  - Level 30: +6 Hearts
- **Dynamic Scaling**: If you lose levels (e.g., by enchanting or dying), your max health will decrease accordingly.
- **Server-Side Only**: This mod only needs to be installed on the server. Clients do not need to install it to see the extra hearts.
